package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gorm_session_options_configured_outside_repository: Code above the repository layer that changes `Session`, `Clauses`, or transaction options directly.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule067NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule067NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule067NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario067Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule067NegativeService, input Rule067NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
